caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a dark navy blue blazer over a dark button-down shirt, stands at a podium against a plain, light-gray background. He is captured mid-speech, with his expression and posture shifting slightly as he speaks. A thin black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him, and a clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap sits on the surface of the podium. The logo "mediasite by ensemble" appears in the top left and bottom left of the frame. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts his head and torso, moving from a more forward-facing position to a slight profile. His hands, partially visible at the bottom of the frames, move as he gestures while speaking.
